name: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG
description: sig-intelligence is a working group dedicated to incubating intelligent agent applications and toolchains, with a vision to integrate intelligent operating systems, expedite the dissemination of AI technologies, and advance explorations in their applications.

name: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG maintains 112 repositories in the AI and Machine Learning domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for sig-intelligence is a working group dedicated to incubating intelligent agent applications and toolchains, with a vision to integrate intelligent operating systems, expedite the dissemination of AI technologies, and advance explorations in their applications.. The SIG has 72 core members and maintains 112 repositories in the AI and Machine Learning domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-intelligence SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-intelligence SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at intelligence@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-intelligence SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG maintains 112 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-intelligence.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-intelligence SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Zhengce Hu, Shoucheng He, Kaitian Du. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
